name: startx-founders
description: Claude Code skills and plugins built by StartX founders, for StartX founders. Community-curated, not Anthropic-verified.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep multi-source research with source quality evaluation and hard quality gates. Launches parallel research agents, classifies sources by tier, cross-references findings, and synthesizes structured reports.

plugins.name: eval-first
plugins.description: Bakes evaluation thinking into model-output work. Every plan names what success looks like, where things can go wrong, and proposes simple checks validating key assumptions.

plugins.name: claude-secrets
plugins.description: Paste a credential into a system popup, store it in macOS Keychain, then reference it by name from any command. The value never enters Claude's context window.

plugins.name: startx-boa-prep
plugins.description: Help a StartX founder prepare for a Board of Advisors meeting or CEO/advisor review. Walks six StartX forcing questions across the whole company, demands evidence per claim, and produces an advisor-ready pre-read with explicit open risks, consolidated asks, and a routing back into StartX's own support surfaces.

plugins.name: startx-office-hours-prep
plugins.description: Help a StartX founder prep for office hours, a mentor 1:1, or a Lead Mentor 1:1. Walks six StartX forcing questions, routes by session type, company stage, and BoA cycle phase, and produces a prep doc in the StartX BoA challenge format that can also seed a Board of Advisors pre-read.

plugins.name: startx-boa-debrief
plugins.description: Help a StartX founder debrief a Board of Advisors meeting (or mentor session): think through the board's input and build a follow-up outline (you write the email), with a confirmation gate so nothing unconfirmed carries through, plus a handoff that seeds the next pre-read.
